title: Replace all Babulus studio-web players with VideoML standard player
description: After TransportControls and player-with-transport exist in VideoML Player: replace every player in Babulus apps/studio-web that currently has transport controls (e.g. PreviewPlayer and its usages in PreviewEmbed, DocsPreviewPlayer, video-editor, studio-workspace) with the standard VideoML player so Babulus consumes the core library instead of its own control bar. Depends on player-hgy.

title: Add support for animated scientific charting libraries
description: Plan support for integrating animated scientific charting libraries (library choice TBD) into the VideoML stack: evaluate candidate libs, define rendering approach (DOM/runtime/stdlib), API surface, perf/safety constraints, and integration steps before implementation.

title: Plan and add TransportControls and player-with-transport
description: Plan and implement TransportControls (play, pause, reset, seek, time display) and a player-with-transport component in a clean way. The Player package should be the core video library: drop on a page and get full transport. Keep VideomlDomPlayer as headless primitive. Use Storybook to design the controls. See player/DESIGN.md.
